posts.caption:
Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab just dropped Inkling — a 975B-parameter open-weight model trained on 45 trillion tokens across text, image, audio, and video. It's a mixture-of-experts architecture that reasons natively across all four modalities, not just text with bolt-on vision. Open weights. Multimodal from the ground up. This one's worth a close look.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AINews #OpenSource #MultimodalAI #ThinkingMachines #MiraMurati #GenerativeAI

story.title: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines releases Inkling, an open 975B-param multimodal model
story.dek: Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, an open-weight mixture-of-experts model trained on 45 trillion tokens across text, image, audio, and video—reasoning natively across all modalities.

posts.caption:
Suno's training data just got a lot more specific. Leaked documents reveal the AI music generator pulled millions of songs from YouTube, Deezer, and Genius — without disclosed consent from the platforms or the artists behind them. The fair use fight in AI music just got a paper trail.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIMusic #Suno #AIRights #MusicIndustry #ArtificialIntelligence

story.title: Suno trained on millions of scraped songs from YouTube, Deezer, Genius
story.dek: Leaked data reveals the AI music generator sourced training material from major platforms without disclosed consent, raising fair use questions for creators and platforms.

posts.caption:
SideFX just dropped Houdini 22, and the headline feature is native Gaussian Splatting — no plugins, no workarounds. You can create, edit, and animate 3D Gaussian Splats directly inside Houdini for the first time, alongside a redesigned UI and workflow upgrades across VFX, game dev, and procedural art. Big release for anyone working at the intersection of real-world capture and CG pipelines.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#Houdini #GaussianSplatting #VFX #3D #AITools #ProceduralArt

story.title: Houdini 22 adds native Gaussian Splatting support and redesigned UI
story.dek: SideFX's major release brings native 3D Gaussian Splat creation, editing, and animation without third-party tools, plus workflow upgrades for VFX, game dev, and procedural art.

posts.caption:
Prompt literacy is table stakes now. The creators actually doing interesting work with AI image tools have shifted into a different mode entirely — less "generate this thing" and more "here's the vision, let's iterate until we get there." The craft isn't in the words you type. It's in knowing what you're looking for and how to get there.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#AIArt #GenerativeAI #AICreators #Midjourney #CreativeAI #DigitalArt

story.title: The Best AI Artists Aren't Prompting. They're Directing.
story.dek: Everyone with a browser can type a prompt. That stopped being impressive about five minutes after Midjourney launched. The real skill gap has moved somewhere else entirely.

posts.caption:
Concept artist Daniel Porto has been building a creative vision for 20 years — AI is finally letting him execute it at the speed he thinks. His take: prompting isn't the skill that matters. Experienced judgment about *what's worth making* is what separates serious creatives from the noise. Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIart #conceptart #AItools #generativeAI #creativeindustry

story.title: Concept artist Daniel Porto accelerates 20 years of vision with AI
story.dek: Porto leverages AI to collapse the gap between imagination and production, but emphasizes experienced judgment—not prompting—as the real competitive edge in creative work.

posts.caption:
The direct-to-video B-movie playbook is back — this time powered by AI. Startups are rushing out AI-generated films timed to blockbuster hype cycles, skipping theaters entirely and going straight to digital. It's a decades-old cash-grab strategy, just with a much lower production budget and a text prompt.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#AIfilm #generativevideo #AIstartups #directtovideo #AIcreators

story.title: AI startups release direct-to-video generated films as cash-grab strategy
story.dek: An AI startup is capitalizing on blockbuster hype by rushing out AI-generated films directly to digital release, mirroring decades-old direct-to-video B-movie economics.
